hero.title: We rewrite the internal code of companies.
hero.subtitle: We help tech companies connect technical excellence with human maturity so they can grow faster, healthier, and with less chaos.
hero.description: We find bottlenecks, fine-tune strategy, processes, and team collaboration, and create an environment where people take responsibility, work has meaning, and change continues even without our constant intervention.
hero.outcome: The result is a company with clear direction, higher performance, and the energy to grow.
hero.cta: Find out where we lose performance

about.title: About Us
intro: HumanSoft.IT was founded for companies that want more than to fix isolated problems.

We believe the future of tech companies is not built on technical expertise alone. It is built by people who can collaborate, think in context, take responsibility, and turn vision into concrete results.
That is why we connect strategic consulting, work with teams, process design, and leadership development into one coherent whole.
We don't come to deliver a document for the drawer. We help companies kickstart a self-driven process of change with real impact on performance, culture, and long-term sustainability.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.text: We believe in a world where the fusion of technical mastery and key human skills forms the foundation of leading tech companies. The future will not belong to companies with the best technology alone. It will belong to those who can combine expertise, responsibility, meaning, collaboration, and the ability to learn faster than their problems.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.text: We craft solutions, tools, and transformation processes tailored to companies that want to operate more efficiently, more consciously, and with sustainable impact. We help raise performance, empower individuals, develop teams, and design systems of work so a company can solve its challenges ever more independently. Our goal is not to make companies dependent on consultants. Our goal is to awaken in them the ability to see, name, and solve their own challenges.

about.valuesLabel: The values we build change on

values.name: Freedom
values.description: We believe people can take responsibility only where they have space to think, decide, and grow.

values.name: Meaning
values.description: Every change must make sense to people and to the business. Otherwise it stays only on paper.

values.name: Personal Growth
values.description: A company grows as far as its people are willing to grow.

values.name: Work
values.description: Real change doesn't happen in a presentation. It happens in everyday work, decisions, and habits.

values.name: Fun & Joy
values.description: We believe performance doesn't have to come from pressure. It can come from energy, trust, and joy in working together.

about.cta: Let's find meaning in the system

why.title: Why Companies Choose HumanSoft.IT
why.description: When a tech company grows, better tools, more people, or a new process are not enough.
paragraphs: Pressure on leadership rises. Decisions multiply. Communication gets complicated. Owners hold too many things in their heads. Teams lose clarity, competencies overlap, and energy meant for growth is consumed putting out operational fires.
We help companies turn this moment into an opportunity.

We step in where strategy, people, and daily operations need to be connected. We look for real causes, not just visible symptoms. We propose solutions that make sense in practice, and we guide the company so the change doesn't stay dependent on us.
why.conclusion: HumanSoft.IT helps companies move from improvisation to conscious performance.

services.title: What We Do
intro: We help companies find where performance, responsibility, meaning, or energy is being lost — and turn it into a working system.
We don't just solve processes. We don't just solve people. We don't just solve strategy.
We connect every layer of the company so technical expertise, leadership, communication, accountability, and daily execution start pulling in the same direction.
closing: Our goal is not to deliver a document.
Our goal is a company that can operate, grow, and solve its challenges from within.
We help companies build an environment where technical expertise meets meaning, responsibility, freedom, and joy in work.

sections.title: We find where the company loses momentum
sections.description: Every company has places where something repeats. Decisions come back. People don't understand each other. The owner holds too many things in their head. Strategy exists but doesn't live in practice. Teams work hard, but performance is lost in the noise.
sections.approach: We look for these places, name them, and turn them into concrete solutions.
items: finding bottlenecks in the company
mapping where time, energy, and responsibility are lost
recognizing dysfunctional patterns in management and communication
naming the real causes, not just visible problems
creating a clear picture of what the company needs to change
sections.result: The owner and team finally see what's holding the company back, where losses occur, and where to start so the change has real business impact.

sections.title: We translate vision into a manageable strategy
sections.description: Many owners feel exactly where they want to take the company. But the idea alone isn't enough. It needs structure, priorities, decision-making logic, and concrete steps. Otherwise it stays in the founder's head, in a presentation, or in endless discussions.
sections.approach: We help translate vision into a strategy that can be managed, communicated, and implemented.
items: designing the entire company strategy
translating ideas into clear priorities and steps
setting up decision-making lines
aligning the owner, leadership, and key people
creating an executive plan that is actually used
sections.result: Strategy doesn't stay on the wall. It becomes a daily compass for decision-making, leading people, developing teams, and further growth.

sections.title: We set communication that saves time and energy
sections.description: In companies, performance often doesn't suffer because people can't work. It suffers because it's unclear who decides what, who is responsible for what, how information flows, and how tension is handled. Then assumptions, duplication, unnecessary meetings, and fatigue from constant explaining arise.
sections.approach: We set communication, responsibilities, and collaboration so the company doesn't have to keep fighting the same situations over and over.
items: setting up effective communication between people and teams
clarifying roles, responsibilities, and competencies
removing duplication, noise, and operational collisions
establishing a rhythm of meetings, reflections, and decision-making
strengthening collaboration instead of internal pulling
sections.result: People know what is expected of them, how to talk to each other, and how to move things forward without unnecessary friction.

sections.title: We rewrite company patterns that hinder growth
sections.description: Every company has its habits. Some hold it together. Others invisibly slow it down. The way decisions are made, communication happens, responsibility is passed, or mistakes are handled creates the company's reality.
sections.approach: We help companies consciously change behavioral patterns that no longer serve their next stage.
items: changing entrenched reactions in teams and leadership
strengthening a self-driven approach
developing leadership in key people
working with responsibility, trust, and feedback
long-term development through guided reflection
sections.result: Change isn't just a new structure. It's a new way of thinking, deciding, and collaborating across the company.

sections.title: We build self-driven teams
sections.description: The greatest value of change emerges when the company stops being dependent on individuals, the owner, or external leadership.
sections.approach: We help teams grow toward greater independence, accountability, and the ability to solve problems on time — without endlessly waiting for instructions from above.
items: developing team independence
supporting accountable decision-making
establishing regular guided reflection
strengthening the ability to learn from practice
creating an environment where people know why their work makes sense
sections.result: The company gains teams that don't just wait for assignments — they think, decide, collaborate, and move things forward.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: Change is not a one-off intervention. It's a guided cycle. We always read each company in its real context — no universal templates.
process.centerSubtitle: Every collaboration has a clear direction, but stays alive.

step1.title: Probe into the company
step1.description: We enter the company, map the terrain, and listen to people across the structure.

step2.title: Deep analysis
step2.description: We name the real causes, not just visible problems.

step3.title: Pilot project
step3.description: We first verify the proposed solution in practice.

step4.title: Implementing change
step4.description: We embed changes into the company's everyday operations.

step5.title: Reflection and next cycle
step5.description: We evaluate impact and define the next steps.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: We are partners of change — not external auditors. We don't come into companies from above. We work with people, listen to context, and together with teams find solutions that make sense in practice. Our strength lies in connecting business thinking, technical context, psychology, leadership, process management, and work with people.

member1.name: Daniela Kolomazníková
member1.shortBio: I'm an analyst with a human face – I combine psychology and research with real-world practice. Over 20,000 consulting hours, 200 companies, and 15 years leading my own businesses. I set a path clients can follow and measure the results.
member1.bio:
I have been dealing with questions of proper leadership and company management since 1999. I focus on people selection, communication, motivation, and management. I combine knowledge of psychology, the latest research, and everyday business practice so that companies and their people can get the most out of them.

In my work, I use techniques for proper employee selection as well as individual and group development. With clients, I deliver comprehensive educational programs, individual consultations, coaching, and mentoring. For the last 15 years, I have been leading small and medium-sized companies myself, which is why I believe primarily in what holds up in real-world operations.

I structure our joint work, regularly evaluate it, and measure it. I care about results and real value for the company. I leverage experience from my own companies and over 20,000 coaching hours with clients. For company owners and CEOs, I organize Expert Board mastermind groups, connecting experiences, sharing, and new perspectives. Thanks to psychology and analytical thinking, I can find both insight and perspective on topics that companies truly need to solve.

member2.name: Pavel Vřesňák
member2.shortBio: I'm a natural leader with years of executive management experience, mainly in technology and IT. I combine a deep technical foundation with business thinking and sensitivity for working with people. I help companies read their reality, name the true causes of difficulties, and find solutions that make sense both strategically and humanly.
member2.bio:
I'm a leader with extensive experience in executive management, primarily in technology and IT. In my professional approach, I combine a technical foundation, business thinking, and sensitivity for working with people. This combination forms the framework of my specialization.

From childhood, I was passionate about programming and professionally continued with studies at VUT FIT. After school, however, instead of a purely technical career, I chose the path of entrepreneurship, people leadership, and company management. I further expanded my education at the Institute of Applied Psychology and Essential College.

Throughout my career, I have led, developed, and stabilized companies and teams of various sizes – from smaller companies to divisions of larger Czech and international organizations. My primary domain is executive management, especially the CEO role, both in long-term and interim capacities. I also focus on strategic consulting, particularly in the technology and IT segment.

In my work, I rely on the ability to quickly orient myself in complex situations, perceive connections across the company, and name the essence of the problem without unnecessary fluff. I help clients find solutions that make sense strategically, humanly, and operationally. An important part of my work is also developing managers and leadership at an individual level.

member3.name: Lucie Janda
member3.shortBio: I connect organization, project management, and client communication. I make sure things have a clear structure, deadlines, and real progress in practice. I value systematicity, reliability, and the ability to quickly orient in what's needed.
member3.bio:
In my work, I connect organization, project management, client communication, and everyday support of company leadership. I make sure things don't stay just as ideas but have clear structure, deadlines, dependencies, and real progress in practice. As part of our collaboration, I participate in coordinating internal and client activities, organizing events, CRM development, invoicing, and administrative project support.

I have experience with complex task management across various areas – from client communication through operational and organizational agendas to oversight of details that hold the whole together. In my work, I value systematicity, reliability, and the ability to quickly orient in what's needed at any given moment. What matters to me is not only that everything works, but that collaboration is also clear, professional, and human.

Beyond the organizational and coordination role, I also focus on personal development, time management, mentoring, and psychology. I'm interested in how to connect efficiency, healthy functioning, and meaningful communication so that results stand not only on performance but also on well-established relationships and processes. That's where I see my added value – helping create an environment where things can truly move forward.

member4.name: Milan Košdy
member4.shortBio: I'm a consultant, trainer, coach, and psychologist. I combine psychological insight with management practice, helping companies improve people leadership, HR processes, and change management. I work with 360° feedback and assessments – always focused on real impact.
member4.bio:
I have over 20 years of experience in people and organizational development. I studied psychology at FSS MU and spent more than 15 years in managerial roles at multinational corporations and local companies. In my work, I combine psychological insight with top management practice.

I most often focus on HR and change management. I help companies set up management systems, HR processes, compensation, recruitment, and onboarding. I use Assessment & Development Centers, psychodiagnostics, and 360° feedback – always aiming for clear conclusions and concrete steps actionable for both leadership and the team.

I focus on developing managerial competencies, setting accountability, building a culture of collaboration, and healthy team communication. I'm not about theories for the drawer, but about changes that are understandable, human, and measurable in results of people and the entire company. What matters to me is that new ways of working truly function in everyday practice.

member5.name: František Fiala
member5.shortBio: I'm a process and systems consultant. I help companies set up their way of working so it's clear who does what, why, and how it flows – without unnecessary bureaucracy. I model processes, clarify roles, and most importantly implement changes in practice, tool-independently.
member5.bio:
I help turn good decisions into reality. I set up clear work systems for companies: who does what, why they do it, and how work actually flows – without unnecessary complexity and without paper processes nobody lives by.

I'm tool-independent. I look for a way of working that fits your environment and feels natural to your people. I have experience across roles and environments – from manual testing in software development through sales, marketing, and customer care to project management and creating documentation that can actually be used.

This allows me to quickly orient myself in a company's situation and translate it into concrete steps. I typically deliver process modeling and descriptions, role and responsibility clarification, improvement proposals, and most importantly their implementation in practice. I don't do processes for processes' sake. I always focus on what helps the company most at the moment – speed, quality, overview, or more peace in the team.

member6.name: Veronika Hegrová
member6.shortBio: I'm a sales and sales systems consultant. I teach how to sell without pressure: the right questions, clear communication, and win-win outcomes. I also do sales analysis – I show where sales grind and propose changes to grow results.
member6.bio:
I believe in a simple but fundamental thing: when you truly hear your customer, selling becomes much easier. I help teams and individuals ask the right questions, communicate without pressure, and guide a sales conversation to a clear outcome that makes sense for both sides.

I don't go the ego route or a rehearsed show. I start with customer needs and help turn them into a concrete offer and next step. I work practically and with respect for your style. At the same time, I look at sales analytically – I map your current process and identify where friction points unnecessarily arise, where opportunities leak, and why some leads don't convert.

Then I propose simple changes in communication, meeting structure, pipeline management, CRM habits, and measurement. The goal is not just a good feeling, but results. What matters to me is that the customer leaves with certainty they got the best – and that they want to come back.

member7.name: Monika Kunešová
member7.shortBio: I'm a psychologist specializing in work psychology. I focus on managerial development, corporate strategy, and employee experience research. I love sparking the appetite for change in my clients and working with people who are willing to grow.
member7.bio:
I specialize in work psychology. In addition to my mentoring role on Expert Board 21, I also serve as managing director of Emplores s.r.o. In my work, I focus on managerial development, corporate strategy, and employee experience research.

I have many years of experience designing and delivering programs for managerial skills development. I enjoy working with people who are willing to grow, push forward, and continuously work on themselves. I love sparking the appetite for change in my clients and supporting them in transferring new things into practice.

contact.title: Want Change Before It Is Too Late?
contact.subtitle: Get in touch - we will review your situation and suggest next steps.

footer.tagline: We rewrite the internal code of tech companies.
footer.subtagline: Strategy. Processes. People. Teams. Meaning. Performance.

evaluation.title: Evaluate Your Company
evaluation.subtitle: The biggest losses in companies often aren't visible in spreadsheets. They hide in unclear decisions, overloaded people, repeating mistakes, weak communication, or strategy that never made it into daily reality. A short evaluation will help you find out where your company is losing momentum — and where new room for growth can open up.
benefits: Spot weak points before they start slowing the company down
Get an independent view of management, processes, and collaboration
See where time, energy, and responsibility are being lost
Receive concrete prompts on where to start the change
Get a first map of what can move your company forward
evaluation.cta: I want to see where we have reserves

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Insights and experiences from company transformation practice.

references.title: References & Case Studies
references.subtitle: Stories of companies we have helped.
references.cta: I Want My Business to Grow

caseA.title: Reference A
approach: Detailed view of the situation + specific steps with impact
result: Clearer direction, naming of blockers
More open discussions at management meetings, more practical outcomes
Analysis as a document they will return to long-term
caseA.quote: Working with HumanSoft.it helped us a lot. They managed to connect a detailed view of our situation with concrete steps that have impact. Thanks to their work, we realized where something was holding us back, and we set a clearer direction for the future. A big benefit for us was also that they taught us how to lead management meetings better – discussions became more open and outcomes much more practical. The initial analysis they prepared is a document we will return to for the long term.

caseB.title: Reference B
result: Team functioning improvement
Greater independence and maturity of key managers
More precise planning, measurability, fewer conflicts
Efficiency and accountability of managers (including business perception through results)
caseB.quote: Working with HumanSoft.it helped us fundamentally shift how our team operates. Key managers grew toward greater independence and maturity. The newly established delivery process brought more precise planning, measurability, and fewer conflicts during delivery. The revision of the organizational structure and clearer role definitions improved efficiency and strengthened managers' accountability, especially in their economic (business) perception of the company through results.

caseC.title: Reference C
caseC.situation: Gaps in company operations and management
approach: Personal mentoring of selected key people
result: Visible impact on daily team operations
Improved internal communication and collaboration
Better overview of project economics
caseC.quote: HumanSoft.it helped us clearly identify where we had gaps in the operation and management of our company, and proposed small changes that had quick and visible impact on the team's daily work. Communication and collaboration inside the company improved significantly. At the same time, thanks to their approach, we gained a better overview of our project economics. And all of it with very personal and human collaboration, including personal mentoring of selected key people in the company.

caseD.title: Reference D
caseD.situation: Need for clearer, faster and more modern communication
approach: Simple rules for email, chat and calendars
Extended use of corporate calendar features
result: Smooth transition to new tool without confusion
Strengthened team dynamics
More efficient calendar management
caseD.quote: We needed to introduce a clearer, faster, and more modern way of communication in our team. Thanks to František's professional guidance while rolling out MS Teams in the company, we managed not only to strengthen team dynamics but also to smoothly handle the transition to the new tool – without confusion or uncertainty. Clearly set but simple rules for using email, chat, and calendars played a big role. We had been using calendars before, but thanks to František's prompts we started discovering and fully leveraging the wider range of features they offer.

caseE.title: Reference E
approach: Changing the approach to timesheets and implementing them in practice
result: Daily work reporting became standard
Resistance almost disappeared
caseE.quote: Timesheets used to be a dirty word in our company. Nobody wanted to deal with them. And then František came along. Within a few months, the whole topic turned 180 degrees. Now it's completely normal in our company to report daily work, and nobody has the slightest problem with it.

caseF.title: Reference F
caseF.situation: Need for more order, personal disputes slowing the team, 'garage style'
approach: Refining work system for key people
result: Disputes calmed down
Shift to professional level
Readiness for larger projects
caseF.quote: Working with HumanSoft.it helped us bring greater order to how the company operates. Thanks to their guidance, we refined the work system for key people, which also calmed the personal disputes that had been slowing us down. The team learned to build the entire delivery process and the company moved from a garage style to a professional level, ready for larger projects.

caseG.title: Reference G
approach: Long-term coaching and mentoring of key people
result: Team progress in practice (not just theory)
Notable leadership improvement of key people
Impact on daily work and results
caseG.quote: Working with HumanSoft.it wasn't just about theory, but about practical changes. The workshops helped us move the team forward, we learned to manage development better, and thanks to long-term coaching and mentoring, our key people noticeably grew in leadership. Today it's visible in daily work and results.

caseH.title: Reference H (SK)
caseH.situation: Important period, need for project stabilization and transparency
approach: Setting projects for real economic results
Strengthening internal processes and client communication
result: Higher satisfaction on both sides (company and clients)
Deepened partner relationships
More stable company ready for growth and vision
caseH.quote: HumanSoft.it played a key role for us during an important period. Together we brought transparency and stability to our projects, set them up to deliver real economic results, and at the same time strengthened internal processes and communication with clients. This increased satisfaction on both sides and deepened partner relationships. We also managed to kickstart further development of management on both a personal and professional level, uncover hidden opportunities and the potential of people. The result is a more stable company ready for further growth and the realization of our vision.

caseI.title: Reference I
caseI.situation: Unclear roles and frequent conflicts, friction between sales and delivery, missing HR and operations team
result: Fundamental order in management
Fewer conflicts
Ability to hire key people who moved the company forward
caseI.quote: HumanSoft.it nám pomohl udělat zásadní pořádek v řízení firmy. Tam, kde byla dříve nejasnost a časté konflikty, jsme nastavili jasné role. Podařilo se zlepšit vztahy mezi obchodem a delivery a vybudovat funkční HR i operations tým. Díky tomu jsme mohli přijmout klíčové lidi, kteří firmu posunuli dál.

caseJ.title: Reference J
caseJ.situation: Need to streamline internal processes and systematic project and service management
approach: Expert guidance, quick orientation in the issue
Constructive collaboration with focus on results
result: Streamlined communication and processes
Clearer project and task management system
Recommending the service to other companies
caseJ.quote: Na začátku jsme řešili potřebu zefektivnit interní procesy a zlepšit systémové řízení v oblasti projektů a servisu. Od spolupráce jsme očekávali především odborné vedení, praktické návrhy a reálné výsledky. Na spolupráci s týmem Humansoft.it oceňujeme především profesionální přístup, schopnost rychle se zorientovat v problematice a praktické návrhy, které mají okamžitý dopad. Spolupráce probíhala vždy konstruktivně a s důrazem na konkrétní výsledky. Přínosem pro nás bylo nejen zefektivnění komunikace a procesů, ale i jasnější systém řízení projektů a úkolů. Služby bychom rozhodně doporučili dalším firmám, které hledají spolehlivého partnera pro rozvoj a optimalizaci firemních procesů.
